title: Charcoal Foundry
summary: A heavy iron foundry at dusk: matte black metal lit by a single dim amber bulb. Mona Sans Wide carries the voice; the amber filament lives only on the saving pill and the active dock bar.
darkAccent: amber #E08A2C — saving pill + active dock left bar (nowhere else)
typeface: Mona Sans (Wide cut 115–125% for headings, Regular for body)
railTreatment: five stamped roundels with one dominant first-letter (S · M · B · D · L) and a subscript partner — silhouette-distinct in peripheral vision
